version_pin_rationale: Hyprland v0.41.2 is the last upstream release that links cleanly against Mesa 23.x (later versions need Mesa 25's DRM_FORMAT_MOD changes). THIS CATALOG IS ADVISORY ONLY — DE-H1's build script SKIPS catalog entries where provisioning_methods[].kind == 'upstream-source-tarball'. Reasons (see docs/wayland-de-hyprland.md 'Why sway (not Hyprland)'): (1) Hyprland is NOT in jammy main/universe at all; apt-cache show hyprland returns 'no packages found'. (2) Hyprland's GitHub Releases ship ONLY source tarballs (~52 MB); there is no statically-linked binary asset. (3) Building from source needs C++23 (jammy's g++-11 is C++20; needs g++-13 backport), meson, hyprwayland-scanner (itself a Hyprland-org C++ utility), 12 dev deps. Multi-day build cascade outside DE-H1 scope. This catalog reserves the slot with the upstream URL + size pin; a future DE-H-build-hyprland-from-source milestone fills in the sha256 (currently DEFERRED) + the from-source build recipe + the expected_files[] list. DE-H1's active compositor is sway (see sway.json) — same wlroots-based architecture, same DE0-G dep set, jammy-native.
